settings.title: Session Throughput (per hour)
settings.query: customEvents | where name == 'SESSION_COMPLETED' | summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1h) | render timechart

settings.title: Agent Latency (p50/p95/p99)
settings.query: dependencies | where target contains 'openai' | summarize p50=percentile(duration, 50), p95=percentile(duration, 95), p99=percentile(duration, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | render timechart

settings.title: Error Rate by Agent
settings.query: exceptions | summarize count() by cloud_RoleName, bin(timestamp, 1h) | render barchart

settings.title: Grounding Score Distribution
settings.query: customMetrics | where name == 'grounding_score' | summarize avg(value), min(value), max(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h) | render timechart

settings.title: Decision Distribution (GO/NO-GO/CONDITIONAL)
settings.query: customEvents | where name == 'SESSION_COMPLETED' | extend decision = tostring(customDimensions.decision) | summarize count() by decision | render piechart

settings.title: Service Bus Dead Letter Queue Depth
settings.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.SERVICEBUS' | where MetricName == 'DeadletteredMessages' | summarize max(Total) by Resource, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | render timechart

settings.title: Container App Replica Count
settings.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.APP' | where MetricName == 'Replicas' | summarize max(Total) by Resource, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | render timechart

alertRules.name: High Error Rate
alertRules.description: Alert when error rate exceeds 5% of requests
alertRules.query: requests | summarize errorRate = todouble(countif(success == false)) / count() * 100 | where errorRate > 5

alertRules.name: Low Grounding Score
alertRules.description: Alert when average grounding score drops below 0.6
alertRules.query: customMetrics | where name == 'grounding_score' | summarize avg(value) | where avg_value < 0.6

alertRules.name: DLQ Accumulation
alertRules.description: Alert when DLQ messages exceed 10 across any topic
alertRules.query: AzureMetrics | where MetricName == 'DeadletteredMessages' | summarize max(Total) | where max_Total > 10

alertRules.name: Session Timeout
alertRules.description: Alert when sessions remain in RETRIEVING for >10 minutes
alertRules.query: customEvents | where name == 'SESSION_TIMEOUT' | summarize count() | where count_ > 0
